events.title: Floor 41 elevators stuck for 6 hours, Rita brought a folding chair
events.description: Around 9 AM the Floor 41 elevator banks froze between floors. Maintenance took six hours to clear. By hour two there was a small impromptu salon in the lobby. Rita Cheng had a folding chair.

posts.text: Elevators on 41 stuck. Six hours. What happens when you put Off-the-Shelf parts in for Critical Infrastructure. A Building needs constant care, not just talk. Don't know why anyone would be up there anyway.

Well THAT was an morning! Six hours stuck on Floor 41, can you believe it??? But we made the best of it, honey. My folding chair was a lifesaver, everyone kept saying so. I even saw one of those little origami cranes on the floor by the elevator banks --- makes you think, doesn't it? xoxo 💚

The temporary cessation of travel on Floor 41 reminds us that the journey is not always forward. Sometimes, the Aurora bids us to pause, to reflect. Perhaps a longer Inhalation is needed. May all those inconvenienced find peace in the stillness.

Oh my *god* you guys. Floor 41 was practically a scene from *Elevator Averted*! Six hours, *darling*, six hours! And you know who was there? Rita Cheng, with a folding chair! Honestly, what a *trooper*. The drama! The *tension*! This is giving me so many ideas for Act Two!!!
